content.en:
Although the third test was difficult, this time he obtained eight secret techniques, all of which were secret techniques of the level of the secret of swallowing, and for Ye Tian, this was also a great opportunity.

Ye Tian knew very well that even if he failed the assessment, he would be able to become the official disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, above the registered disciples, but his status was not as good as that of the personal disciples.

Ye Tian's purpose is naturally to become the personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, and only by becoming his personal disciple can he get a greater opportunity, and only then can he hope to become a great existence of the Ten Elements Ancestor or surpass the Ten Elements Ancestor.

After obtaining these eight secret techniques, Ye Tian went back and began to silently comprehend.

To Ye Tian's surprise, this time he didn't need to pass the assessment to obtain these eight secret techniques, and he could directly participate in the cultivation of enlightenment.

Of course, these arcane scrolls can only be passed down once, and after passing them on, there is no way to continue to enlighten others, and the inheritance obtained can only be practiced by oneself, and cannot be written.

This kind of secret technique, heaven and earth are not allowed to exist, unless it reaches the existence of the Ten Elements Ancestor, you can create such a inheritance as the secret of swallowing by yourself.

These eight secret techniques are the secret of the body, the secret of emptiness, the secret of time, the secret of power, the secret of the realm, the secret of meaning, the secret of life and the secret of death, plus the secret of enlightenment and the secret of swallowing, which can be called the ten secrets of the ten ancestors of the ten elements.

These ten secret techniques, comprehending any of them, are enough to become the top genius in the Boundary River.

And now, Ye Tian has obtained ten secret techniques, once he has practiced them all, even if he can't pass the third assessment of the Ten Elements Ancestor, his future achievements are limitless.

Among these secret techniques, the secret of the body can better understand one's own body, control all the secrets of the body, and if you practice the secret of the body, you can easily control ten percent of the supreme legendary body.

At the beginning, if Ye Tian had obtained the secret of his body earlier, he would have already condensed the supreme control body.

Moreover, the Secret of the Body can make it easier to find the defects of the physical body and make up for it, and learn how to refine one's body faster, and if it is combined with the Secret of Swallowing, it is enough to raise the physical body to an unimaginable degree.

The Secret of Emptiness is a secret technique of space, once practiced, you can travel anywhere in the Boundary River at will, even if it is the cultivation of a half-step Eternal Master, the speed is faster than that of the Eternal Master, and it is difficult to imprison a cultivator who knows the Secret of Emptiness, and many bans can be easily broken.

The Secret of Time is the Secret Technique of Time, even if Ye Tian does not reach the realm of the Eternal Master, he can cross the timeline, cross the past and the future, and he can also manipulate time extremely well.

The Secret of the Sky and the Secret of Time can also be used in battle.

For example, the secret of time can speed up your own mental consciousness, the enemy's attack will become very slow in your eyes, if the enemy's will is strong, your own will is very weak, and you can't react, you can use the secret of time, so as to keep up with the opponent's movements.

The Secret of Force is the most common of these secret arts, but it can greatly increase its combat power, allowing its own strength to be increased by ten times or even dozens of times, and breaking its own attack ceiling with the power of one blow.

If Ye Tian had obtained the secret of his strength at the beginning, it would have been easier to kill the Godless City Lord.

The Secret of the Will is a secret technique of will, which can increase one's own will power, for example, if the will of the late eighth order gets the increase of the secret of the will, it can be temporarily raised to the level of the peak will of the eighth order.

The secret of life represents the endless life, once the secret of life, serious injuries can be quickly recovered, he can rely on the secret of life to fight continuously, not afraid of any injury.

And the secret of death is a secret technique that manipulates the life and death of others, similar to the means of godless city lords, but the purpose of this secret art is not to control others, but to protect.

That's right, the secret of death is protection, once a living creature is given a secret of death, you can not only control the life and death of others, but also protect him, if the other party is killed, you can use the secret of death to resurrect it.

In the Void Zone, some ordinary people can be resurrected easily when they die, but once a lord-level creature falls, the Eternal Controller can't resurrect it, no matter how powerful it is.

But the secret of death can be turned into life and resurrected.

As a result, this secret art is terrifying, and it exerts the way of death to an unimaginable degree.

Of course, the Secret of Death cannot be cast on many people, at most nine living beings, and it cannot be cast on a strength that surpasses oneself.

Moreover, the other party needs to be willing to perform the secret of death on it.

"You can use the secret of death on your family, and if they are in danger in the future, I don't save them in time, causing them to fall, and you can also use the secret of death to resurrect them. Ye Tian thought to himself.

So in the following days, Ye Tian practiced these secret techniques with all his might.

Time flies, and a secret technique has been successfully cultivated with Ye Tian's efforts.

And Ye Tian discussed it with his family, and put a death secret on them, which usually had no effect, and they did not change anything.

As long as the family members are fine, this secret art is equivalent to not being used.

It can be said that Ye Tian really doesn't need to worry about the safety of his family now, even if they go crazy to experience and die, it doesn't matter.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't tell the true effect of the secret of death, otherwise they would really go crazy and die, and he would have a headache.

Ten secret techniques have been practiced, and Ye Tian's current strength has reached an incomparably terrifying level, and he can easily kill an eternal controller like a godless city lord.

But his goal now is to integrate the ten secret arts, and create a supreme secret art that surpasses the ten secret arts, so that he can be qualified to pass the third test.

I have to say, this test is too perverted.

Right now, Ye Tian didn't have any clue.

He tried to create a secret art, but the secret art he created at the beginning was very average, not as good as these ten secret arts.

Fortunately, among these ten secret arts, there is also a secret of enlightenment, which can assist him in comprehending and creating, otherwise he really has no hope of passing the third test.

But even with the help of the secret of enlightenment, he didn't have much certainty.

One boundary river year after another has passed, and in the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of boundary river years have passed.

Over the years, Ye Tian has become more and more familiar with the ten secret arts, but he still hasn't passed the third test.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't gain nothing, his strength had improved a lot, his physical body had been raised to another limit, and he had more control over some scarves.

this day.

Ye Tian was in the process of contemplating and cultivating, and suddenly had a flash of inspiration.

Then, he grasped this ray of aura, and gradually understood how to create this secret art.

On the basis of the ten secret arts, I created this secret art beyond the ten secret arts, but I should not be bound by these ten secret arts, if I am bound, I will not be able to create a secret art beyond them. These ten secret techniques have been perfected to the extreme, and I can't be more powerful than the Ten Elements Ancestors, so just simply comprehending these ten secret techniques will not be able to successfully create secret techniques that surpass them. "

Ye Tian knew that he had to take the ten secret techniques as the core, to comprehend other things, to comprehend other things, so as to break out of the shackles, so as to hope to create a heaven-defying secret technique that surpassed the ten secret techniques. _
